title: Povežite redove podataka

solutions.name: script

hooks.beforeEach:
const _testText = [
  'Given$a$text$file$of$many$lines',
  'where$fields$within$a$line$',
  'are$delineated$by$a$single$"dollar"$character',
  'write$a$program',
  'that$aligns$each$column$of$fields$',
  'by$ensuring$that$words$in$each$',
  'column$are$separated$by$at$least$one$space.',
  'Further,$allow$for$each$word$in$a$column$to$be$either$left$',
  'justified,$right$justified',
  'or$center$justified$within$its$column.'
];

const rightAligned = '     Given          a      text   file     of     many     lines\n' +
'     where     fields    within      a   line \n' +
'       are delineated        by      a single "dollar" character\n' +
'     write          a   program\n' +
'      that     aligns      each column     of   fields \n' +
'        by   ensuring      that  words     in     each \n' +
'    column        are separated     by     at    least       one space.\n' +
'  Further,      allow       for   each   word       in         a column to be either left \n' +
'justified,      right justified\n' +
'        or     center justified within    its  column.';

const leftAligned = 'Given      a          text      file   of     many     lines    \n' +
'where      fields     within    a      line   \n' +
'are        delineated by        a      single "dollar" character\n' +
'write      a          program  \n' +
'that       aligns     each      column of     fields   \n' +
'by         ensuring   that      words  in     each     \n' +
'column     are        separated by     at     least    one       space.\n' +
'Further,   allow      for       each   word   in       a         column to be either left \n' +
'justified, right      justified\n' +
'or         center     justified within its    column. ';

const centerAligned = '  Given        a        text     file    of     many     lines  \n' +
'  where      fields    within     a     line  \n' +
'   are     delineated    by       a    single \"dollar\" character\n' +
'  write        a       program \n' +
'   that      aligns     each    column   of    fields  \n' +
'    by      ensuring    that    words    in     each   \n' +
'  column      are     separated   by     at    least      one    space.\n' +
' Further,    allow       for     each   word     in        a     column to be either left \n' +
'justified,   right    justified\n' +
'    or       center   justified within  its   column. ';

tests.text: formatText(testText, 'right') trebalo bi da prikaže tekst sa redovima poravnati desno.
formatText(testText, 'left') Trebalo bi da izbaci tekst sa redovima poravnati na lijevo.
formatText(testText, 'center') Trebalo bi da izbaci tekst sa centriranim redovima.

description: Ako vam je dat red više linija, gde su delovi unutar linije podeljeni jednim karakterom $, napišite program koji poredi svaki red delova, osiguravajući da su reči u svakom redu razdvojene sa najmanje jednim razmakom. Pored toga, dozvolite da svaka reč u redu bude poravnana levo, desno ili centrirano unutar svog reda.
instructions:
Koristite sledeći tekst za testiranje svojih programa:

const testText = [
  'Given$a$text$file$of$many$lines',
  'where$fields$within$a$line$',
  'are$delineated$by$a$single$"dollar"$character',
  'write$a$program',
  'that$aligns$each$column$of$fields',
  'by$ensuring$that$words$in$each$',
  'column$are$separated$by$at$least$one$space.',
  'Further,$allow$for$each$word$in$a$column$to$be$either$left$',
  'justified,$right$justified',
  'or$center$justified$within$its$column.'
];

Zapamtite da:

  • Linije tekstualnog primjera unosa mogu imati ili ne imati dolarske znakove na kraju.
  • Sve redove treba da dele istu poravnanost.
  • Ponovljeno razmak koji se generiše blizu kraja linija nije bitan za potrebe vežbanja.
  • Tekst rezultata će biti prikazan u monospacen fontu u standardnom tekst editoru ili jednostavnom terminalu. Linije unutar njega treba da se spoje korišćenjem znaka novog reda (\n).
  • Minimalni razmak između redova treba da se izračuna na osnovu teksta, a ne da bude hardkodiran.
  • Nije potrebno dodavati razdvajajuće znakove između ili blizu redova.

Na primer, jedna od linija iz testText, nakon poređanja desne strane, leve i srednje za taj tok:

'    column        are separated     by     at    least       one space.\n'
'column     are        separated by     at     least    one       space.\n'
'  column      are     separated   by     at    least      one    space.\n'
